title: Moeve Signs Agreement with Pretium Renovables to Build Up to Six Biomethane Plants in Spain
content: Moeve has signed a strategic agreement with Pretium Renovables to develop between four and six biomethane plants in Spain, with Andalusia designated as the priority region. Each facility is projected to have a production capacity of 60 GWh per year. This partnership supports Moeve's "Positive Motion" strategy, which aims to manage 4TWh of biomethane by 2030. By transforming agricultural and livestock waste into renewable gas, the initiative contributes to the circular economy and rural economic development. The plants are expected to reduce COâ‚‚ emissions by approximately 14,600 tons per year each, serving as a substitute for natural gas in industrial and mobility sectors. Adrien Souchet, Director of Biomethane at Moeve, highlighted that this collaboration strengthens their ecosystem of partners, accelerating the rollout of renewable gas and decarbonization projects in high-potential regions.
author: Analysts Account
